full_text:
Pei Yue (Lingxu) 裴越 (令緒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pei Yue (裴越), styledLingxu (令緒). Son of Pei Jun, had a military role in Shu. Returned to Luoyang when Shu fell. Pei Yue was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
